message: Jake
Ash
Jennifer
I think it will take a while to check that key I borrowed from Bob.
Sorry for interrupting you when you seem busy.
No, it’s fine.
But come to think of it, I feel like a detective, huh.
Don’t say that. I'm pretty hurt by this, you know.
I'm sorry, I've been a bit sarcastic lately because I’m tired.
Good evening.
Is this okay?
Well, I'll step back.
What are you talking about? You can stay.
Yeah, that's right. Please stay.
I don’t have a hobby of butting into others' love lives.
I want you to become a witness, too.
Witness?
Witness? What happened?
Well, I...
I can't stand it when you act cold towards me.
When did I ever act cold towards you?
You don’t have to act like this just because you don’t like me being with the director at the party.
Hey, I don't recall having such an attitude. Besides, wasn't your attitude weird at the party?
Right.
That’s not true. I was perfectly normal.
You two, just be quiet for now.
What on earth is the reason for this?
Are you trying to pretend? Using someone to call me with harassment?
That's terrible.
I don't know about any harassment calls; that must be someone else.
That’s right,
would never stoop to such underhanded tactics. I'm too honest for that.
Are you a part of the group too, bartender-san? That's outrageous. Everyone is making a fool of me.
That's a misunderstanding. There's really no such fact.
What did you say? Are you still playing dumb?
I wanted to stay quiet, but today's
shrill voice was giving me a headache.
Running out of words to say to ears that wouldn’t listen, I chose the path of passive resolution and decided to leave the shop.
Wait a minute! Are you just going to run away without making excuses?
Right now, it seems like your ears wouldn’t accept anything.
What are you talking about! No, please don’t be cold!
Surely
you must be tired.
As this thought crossed my mind, Kristy’s side profile suddenly flashed before me.
Today's
looks like Kristy.
And thus, a miserable day came to an end.
